jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Merck India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Merck India in Lucknow offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Merck India:
Merck India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Merck India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
